mapper.select: SELECT a.dog_number, a.dog_name, a.dog_age, a.dog_weight, a.dog_breed, s.shelter_name, a.dog_safe_date FROM ddd_archive a JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON a.user_number = s.user_number ORDER BY a.dog_archive_date DESC;

SELECT a.dog_number, a.dog_name, a.dog_age, a.dog_weight, a.dog_breed, s.shelter_name, a.dog_safe_date, a.dog_detail FROM ddd_archive a JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON a.user_number = s.user_number where a.dog_number = #{dog_number};
